sentences.arabic: وَصَلَ الْقِطَارُ مُتَأَخِّرًا بِسَبَبِ الطَّقْسِ السَّيِّئِ.
sentences.translation: Voz je kasnio zbog lošeg vremena.
sentences.translationEn: The train arrived late because of bad weather.

sentences.arabic: انْتَظَرَ الْمُسَافِرُونَ فِي الْمَحَطَّةِ وَهُمْ صَابِرُونَ.
sentences.translation: Putnici su strpljivo čekali na stanici.
sentences.translationEn: The travelers waited at the station patiently.

sentences.arabic: شَرِبَ بَعْضُهُمُ الشَّاي وَتَحَدَّثُوا مَعَ بَعْضٍ.
sentences.translation: Neki od njih su pili čaj i razgovarali.
sentences.translationEn: Some of them drank tea and talked to each other.

sentences.translation: Kad je voz stigao ukrcali su se radosno.
sentences.translationEn: When the train arrived they boarded happily.

words.bs: ukrcali su se / popeli su se
